recommendations.title: The Animatrix
recommendations.overview: Straight from the creators of the groundbreaking Matrix trilogy, this collection of short animated films from the world's leading anime directors fuses computer graphics and Japanese anime to provide the background of the Matrix universe and the conf
recommendations.director: Koji Morimoto, Takeshi Koike, Shinichiro Watanabe, Andrew R. Jones, Yoshiaki Kawajiri, Mahiro Maeda, Peter Chung

recommendations.title: Redline
recommendations.overview: A daredevil driver is determined to compete in Redline, the most popular race in the galaxy. The race only occurs every five years, but in order to participate he must overcome the mafia, the government and even love.

recommendations.title: Beyond
recommendations.overview: While looking for her cat, a young woman and some kids find an abandoned building where strange things happen and the rules of physics don't always apply. Part of the Animatrix collection of animated shorts set in the Matrix universe.

recommendations.title: Matriculated
recommendations.overview: The human resistance works to convert a sentinel to their side. Part of the Animatrix collection of animated shorts set in the Matrix universe.

recommendations.title: Program
recommendations.overview: Cis and Duo discuss leaving the real world while during a samurai sword fight. Part of the Animatrix collection of animated shorts set in the Matrix universe.

recommendations.title: Lupin the IIIrd: Fujiko's Lie
recommendations.overview: Fujiko Mine, the devastating femme fatale whose only loyalty is to her desire, befriends a young boy whose late father hid away a fortune.  A killer is on the boy's trail and it's up to Fujiko to stop him: but where do her interests really lie?

recommendations.title: A Detective Story
recommendations.overview: A private detective is hired to find the elusive computer hacker "Trinity." Part of the Animatrix collection of animated shorts in the Matrix universe.

recommendations.title: Lupin the Third: Jigen's Gravestone
recommendations.overview: Lupin & Jigen have their sights set on a treasure called the Little Comet, which is located in the heavily fortified country of East Doroa. During the heist, Jigen is almost killed by a sniper named Yael Okuzaki. His specialty is preparing tombstones

recommendations.title: Lupin the 3rd: Goemon's Blood Spray
recommendations.overview: A yakuza boss hires Goemon Ishikawa, a modern day samurai, to protect him aboard his cruise ship casino. Everything goes sideways when the famous thief, Lupin the Third, tries to rob the vessel. Lupin's being hunted by a powerful and mysterious man:

recommendations.title: The Matrix
recommendations.overview: Set in the 22nd century, The Matrix tells the story of a computer hacker who joins a group of underground insurgents fighting the vast and powerful computers who now rule the earth.
